title: List of heterosexual male archetypes
intro: A field guide to the heterosexual male archetypes currently in circulation on the English-language web. Sections, and entries within each section, run roughly from most to least common in modern US society. Glosses describe how each term is **used**, not an endorsement of the stereotype; many men belong to several categories at once.

items.gloss: the gym/frat masculine default setting
generic male affirmation, sincere or sarcastic
constitutionally incapable of being taken seriously
performs total unbotheredness, often via the 2024–25 meme character
acts as though everyone else is supporting cast
self-explanatory
melancholy-as-aesthetic men
has opted out of discourse to just grill and relax
vibe frozen in the internet's "last normal year"
K-pop stans, or men styled like idols
flashy, clubby continental-European party guy
at the techno club for the image, not the music
festival-circuit hype man
believes whatever he's told
hyper-masculine all-male-worksite meme; also the classic romance-scammer persona
grill-lawn-schedule masculinity; logistics over prestige; landscaping-compliance civic ambition; neighborhood alliance-builder

items.terms: Sports dad / Dance dad / Pageant dad
items.gloss: kids' activities become coaching, social world and proxy competition

items.terms: Divorced dad / Fun weekend dad / Disney dad
items.gloss: sad-apartment to optimized-second-adulthood range; entertainment and few weekday logistics; wins affection with treats and permissiveness

items.terms: Airport dad / Vacation-itinerary dad / Thermostat dad / Remote-control dad
items.gloss: the household-control-and-logistics set

items.terms: Facebook dad / YouTube-research dad / Costco dad
items.gloss: minion memes and accidental public comments; fixes anything after three videos; provision via bulk buying

items.terms: Serial monogamist / Forever bachelor / Confirmed bachelor
items.gloss: back-to-back serious relationships; bachelorhood as identity; the older euphemistic version

items.terms: Manchild / Peter Pan guy / Failson / Nepo son
items.gloss: adolescent dependence in an adult; avoids settled adulthood; underachiever on family resources; pre-networked heir

items.terms: Man-cave dad / Shed guy / Garage philosopher
items.gloss: sovereign male territory; the detached version; wisdom acquired beside tools
self-concept still resting on early promise; college org as a lifelong institution
rediscovered hobbies; leisure as a construction schedule; older man newly immersed in internet culture
full-time caregiving as identity; the natural-parenting equipment-researcher
adopts practical dad clothing before acquiring children
the family-dynamic personas
confident, conventionally hot alpha (originally incel slang)
father publicly transformed by daughters / sons as a mini adventure unit

items.terms: Dog dad / Cat dad / Plant dad
items.gloss: identity built around pets or houseplants
service members
dominant older-man persona
provider-patriarch ideal with explicit family hierarchy
funds a younger partner; the Splenda wants to but can't afford it
yoga practitioner

items.text: The full dad taxonomy lives in **Life-Stage & Domestic Men** above

items.terms: Gym bro / Gym rat / Gym-bro scientist / Form-police guy
items.gloss: "mirin'" bodybuilding culture; compulsive daily lifter; cites cherry-picked studies between sets; appears under every uploaded squat
moderate softness as maturity; rejects aesthetics while becoming aesthetic
statistical proxy management; games via wagers; footwear enthusiasm as inventory

items.terms: Car guy / Truck guy / Motorcycle guy / JDM guy / Adventure-bike dad / Euro-car masochist
items.gloss: the vehicle-as-identity lineup

items.terms: Golf bro / Pickleball guy / Disc-golf guy / Padel bro
items.gloss: the paddle-and-club social-sport set

items.terms: Run-club guy / CrossFit bro / HYROX bro
items.gloss: group running for fitness, friendship or dating; timed functional workouts + community; the standardized race format

items.terms: Skater boyz / Skate dad / Footie fan / BJJ jocks / Boulder bros
items.gloss: self-explanatory (the skate dad has recovered the hobby, knee pads and purchasing power his younger self lacked)

items.terms: Watch guy / EDC guy / Flashlight guy / Knife guy / Tactical guy / Prepper-lite
items.gloss: "it's engineering, not jewelry"; curated pocket carry; over-bright lights; steel-alloy expertise; coyote-brown gear; generators without the doomsday branding
drug-free (claimed); allegedly enhanced but claiming natural; openly pharmacological

items.terms: Powerlifter / Bodybuilder / Calisthenics guy / Hybrid athlete / Zone-2 guy
items.gloss: strength totals; size-and-symmetry; park-bar control; strength+endurance at once; avoids accidental intensity with near-spiritual discipline
perpetually gaining; always dieting; industrial repetitive eating; quads as a moral achievement

items.terms: Marathon / Ultramarathon dad / Triathlon / Ironman guy
items.gloss: one event reorganizes the calendar; the midlife-crisis distances; three hobbies into one logistics system

items.terms: Climbing dirtbag / Ski bum / Powder bro / Surf bro
items.gloss: structures life around rock, mountain or wave access
"middle-aged man in Lycra"; the over-equipped amateur with pro kit and ordinary speed; the single-gear urban cyclist whose bike once communicated a worldview
adult Lego fans
finishes games as fast as possible; remembers glitches and records across decades
"men would rather dig a tunnel than go to therapy"
the mobility/flexibility-routine guys
stockpiles meal-replacement shakes; efficiency-eating tech bro

items.terms: Corporate drone / Email-job guy / Wagecuck / Spreadsheet man / PowerPoint warrior
items.gloss: standardized office worker; "stakeholders" work; the manosphere insult for a salaried employee; models his way out of ambiguity; strategic certainty one rounded rectangle at a time

items.terms: Hustle bro / Productivity bro / 5 a.m.-club guy / Inbox-zero guy
items.gloss: treats sleep as a defect; designs systems instead of working; makes wake-up time a competition; files anxiety into labeled folders

items.terms: Finance bro / Patagonia-vest bro / Quarter-zip guy / VC bro
items.gloss: markets-golf-comp personality; the mild-outdoor-credibility uniform; polished uniform signaling finance, consulting or private school; treats humans as deal flow

items.terms: Tech bro / Brogrammer / Product guy / PM personality
items.gloss: optimization-instinct engineer; frat masculinity in a technical workplace; "user problem / north star"; organizes friendships into action items

items.terms: LinkedIn lunatic / LinkedIn humblebragger / Thought leader / Consultant bro
items.gloss: turns funerals into B2B lessons; announces a win as a gratitude story; universally-agreeable "insights"; slides and airline status
the 2024 meme ideal: finance job, trust fund, 6'5", blue eyes

items.terms: Cryptobros / Daytraders / Crypto degen / NFT bro / Web3 bro
items.gloss: self-explanatory; reckless speculator-as-identity; the token-picture and blockchain-everything guys

items.terms: Options guy / Dividend dad / FIRE guy / Boglehead / Quant guy / Private-equity guy
items.gloss: narrates macro off one instrument; discusses yield at family events; retires early via aggressive saving; index-fund devotee who finds boredom enlightened; trusts the opaque model; sees inefficiency in functioning institutions

items.terms: Laptop-class guy / Digital-nomad founder / Expat entrepreneur
items.gloss: defined by working anywhere with Wi-Fi; portable startup from coworking spaces; becomes a local business philosopher abroad

items.terms: Dropshipping bro / Amazon FBA guy / Course seller / High-ticket closer / Appointment setter
items.gloss: the make-money-online lineup: one winning product; private-label passive income; sells the course on running the business he claims to have; objection-script coaching; DMs strangers for commission

items.terms: SaaS bro / Indie hacker / Solopreneur / Agency bro
items.gloss: thinks in MRR and funnels; builds in public and posts revenue screenshots; one-person business as a marketing category; sells lead-gen while teaching others to sell it

items.terms: Founder-mode CEO / Visionary founder / Serial entrepreneur / Stealth-mode founder
items.gloss: bypasses management to meddle; reframes failure as far-sightedness; many companies (sometimes because none lasted); can't explain the idea
founder types

items.terms: Trust-fund failson / Nepo baby (male) / Failing-upward guy
items.gloss: insulated from consequences; pre-networked career; promotions via confidence and institutional buoyancy
evaluates everything by eventual sale; would rather buy a plumbing company than build an app

items.terms: Grill dad / BBQ dad / Cast-iron guy / Pizza-oven dad
items.gloss: ceremonial responsibility whenever fire and food coincide; 12 hours smoking to dodge 30 minutes cooking; cookware maintained by inherited law; the specialized-appliance neighborhood pizzaiolo

items.terms: DIY dad / Lawn dad / Home-automation guy / Audiophile homemaker
items.gloss: hiring someone = a missing tool; grass as suburban statecraft; a server and three protocols to turn off the lights; rooms designed around speakers

items.terms: Coffee snob / Pour-over / Espresso / Home-barista boyfriend
items.gloss: extraction-and-altitude before taste; seven-minute single cup; lab equipment to "save money"; care expressed through dialed-in drinks

items.terms: Craft-beer / Whiskey / Bourbon bro / Natural-wine / Tiki guy
items.gloss: the drinks-connoisseur set (bourbon bro joins lotteries for bottles he's afraid to open)

items.terms: Protein guy / Meal-prep guy / Air-fryer evangelist / Home-chef boyfriend
items.gloss: grams-of-protein first; eats Sunday's decisions till Thursday; one appliance "supersedes cooking"; seduces via knife skills
meat temperature as moral position; chases Scoville pain
travel around reservations; cities as constellations of stars
maintains a microbial dependent; jars whose status guests shouldn't question

items.terms: Marvel / Star Wars / DC / Trekkie guy
items.gloss: corporate universes as civic institutions; childhood space fantasy with institutional grievances; hope-reboot-casting cycles; politics via *Star Trek*

items.terms: Console warrior / PC-master-race / Steam-backlog guy / Achievement hunter / Linux gamer
items.gloss: hardware factionalism; collects games as a hobby distinct from playing; optional tasks as obligations; entertainment + driver troubleshooting
self-explanatory; D&D lore obsessive

items.terms: Twitch streamer / OF boys / Booktok bfs
items.gloss: self-explanatory; OnlyFans creators; men matching the BookTok romance-hero ideal

items.terms: Twitch chatter / Backseater / E-sports guy / Discord-kitten guy
items.gloss: emote-and-repetition culture; tells you how to play without the controller; patch notes as sports analysis; buys online affection with mod power or currency
anime-organized non-Japanese fan; obsessive fan (different connotations by language); adult *My Little Pony* fan

items.terms: Soulsborne guy / "Git gud" guy / Lore guy
items.gloss: skill-and-character via hard FromSoft games; answers complaints with "improve"; knows a story the game barely tells

items.terms: Gacha gamer / Whale / MMO lifer / Raid leader
items.gloss: pays/grinds for randomized characters; exceptionally high spender; longer commitment than many marriages; unpaid manager of fictional emergencies
more games than his group can learn; systems over dice-chaos

items.terms: Warhammer guy / Miniatures guy / Rules lawyer / Forever DM / Murderhobo / Min-maxer
items.gloss: the tabletop set (miniatures guy owns the unpainted "pile of shame")

items.terms: Waifu guy / VTuber guy / Anime-PFP guy
items.gloss: devoted to a fictional female partner; follows avatar performers with parasocial loyalty; persona is an anime character (more confrontational than its owner)

items.terms: Retro-gaming purist / Cosplay boyfriend / Convention guy
items.gloss: the medium peaked in childhood; photographer-and-prop-carrier by association; plans the calendar around cons
anthropomorphic-animal fandom

sections.title: Dating-App Personas & Behaviors
sections.note: Labels for both presentation and recurring low-commitment patterns.

items.gloss: vanishes without explanation; blocks you everywhere (extreme edition)
charming, allergic to commitment
over-devoted to someone who barely notices him

items.terms: App hoes / App optimist / App nihilist
items.gloss: perpetually on the apps; still reads every profile sincerely; uses them constantly while insisting nothing real can come of it
matcha, tote bag, feminist novel, wired earbuds, indie playlist, apparently curated to attract women (major 2025–26 stereotype)
just enough intermittent attention to keep you from leaving
relationship access with plausible deniability; the deliberately concealed casual partner
keeps you as a substitute while pursuing preferred options
stopped dating you but keeps liking your stories
resurfaces later as if nothing happened
floods a new partner with intensity, then withdraws or asserts control

items.terms: Gym-selfie guy / Fish-pic guy / Car-selfie guy / Hinge-prompt guy / Podcast-in-bio guy
items.gloss: the profile-cliché lineup

items.terms: Good-morning texter / Pen-pal dater / First-date podcaster
items.gloss: ritual daily texter (devotion or industrial multi-dating); talks forever without meeting; monologues 90 minutes and calls it chemistry
lives in women's social-media replies
jokes about unavailability as a hereditary title; over-texts and catastrophizes silences
turns boundaries, triggers and "holding space" into avoidance tools
aesthetically sensitive man with a suspiciously canonical playlist and calculated instability
fluent in feminist language, unchanged in private; feigns progressive politics to attract partners
stages fashionable books more reliably than he finishes them
rotates several semi-active candidates; his local availability is common knowledge
builds intimacy through plans he won't execute
secretly dates several while claiming exclusivity
mildly deceptive photos/details (short of a full catfish)
periodically re-contacts an ex to stay an option
keeps a partner hidden from friends and family
enters relationships fast because he needs housing/money/support

items.terms: "Where's my hug?" guy / "I hate drama" guy / Devil's-advocate date
items.gloss: the red-flag conversational set

items.terms: Frat bro / Prep-school guy / Ivy bro
items.gloss: US fraternity confidence; affluent selective-school networks; elite-education + bro sociality

items.terms: Country boy / Redneck / Good old boy / Southern gentleman / Cowboy / Hillbilly / Urban cowboy
items.gloss: the Southern-and-rural spectrum

items.terms: Blue-collar guy / Union guy / Trades bro / Oilfield bro / Alaska guy
items.gloss: manual-work identity; organized-labor politics; the online prosperous-electrician; rotation work and big trucks; ruggedness-as-personality

items.terms: Midwest nice guy / Masshole / Jersey guy / Long Island guy / Guido
items.gloss: the US regional-attitude set (the guido: slicked, tanned, gelled Italian-American club stereotype)
chaotic American local-news stock character; the "only in Ohio" cursed-brainrot man
the wave-governed coastal man; the prosperous Aussie/NZ tradesman
the male-network digital nomad; a personality built from cheap travel and accelerated friendship

items.terms: Lad / Lad's lad / Cheeky chappie / Geezer
items.gloss: mates-drink-sport-cheek; the over-committed group performer; charm-escapes-consequences; streetwise (class-dependent)
UK urban street persona; class-coded UK insult; the Australian sportswear-and-slang youth; the Aussie/NZ blunt working-class stereotype

items.terms: Posh boy / Public-school boy / City boy / Essex boy / Football lad
items.gloss: the British class-and-region set
can't cede the car's music; sequences songs instead of talking about feelings
the guitar appears when conversation was working fine

items.terms: Metalhead / Hardcore guy / Punk guy / Crust punk / Emo-revival dad
items.gloss: subgenre boundary-enforcement; moshing and scene ethics; anti-establishment; patches and adversarial hygiene; his adolescence is now heritage
authenticity via expense and shelf weight; improvements others can't hear; impedance and headphone amps

items.terms: Band guy / Indie boy / DJ boyfriend / Bedroom producer / SoundCloud rapper
items.gloss: life ruled by rehearsals; taste-as-availability; nightlife owns his weekends; hundreds of unfinished tracks; improvised branding and face tattoos

items.terms: Male-manipulator-music guy / Radiohead / Deftones / Smiths / Clairo guy
items.gloss: the "guilty by playlist" canon

items.terms: Festival dad / Rave dad / Music-festival boyfriend
items.gloss: supervises while denying it; carries earplugs and institutional memory; relationship subordinate to set conflicts
rave scene
Memphis-revival drift-phonk (car-edit soundtrack) fan; glitchy 100-gecs-style maximalism; Bladee/Drain Gang cloud-rap devotee

items.terms: Wook / Jam-band guy / Deadhead / Phish guy
items.gloss: scruffy festival nomad; "the version is the point"; recordings indexed by date and venue
understands club culture through tightly packed filmed DJ sets

sections.title: Internet Boyfriend Zoology
sections.note: Attractive men classified as dog breeds, animals, foods, or temporary celebrity phenomena.

items.gloss: sunny, affectionate, no games
handsome, kind-hearted, endearingly unintellectual (all three required)
sexually attractive older/father-coded man; silver fox = the grey-haired variant
attractive older man with authority, sophistication, deliberate style
desirable short man whose height is framed as regal
reserved, self-contained, slightly judgmental; the aloof complement
unofficial photographer for his more-visible partner
thick and visibly muscular, but friendly enough not to read as threatening
supporting boyfriend defined by loving a more interesting woman; post-*Barbie* noncompetitive edition
inoffensive but aesthetically and conversationally featureless
the older, domesticated evolution of the type
celebrity treated as an imagined boyfriend by online fandom
white male celebrity briefly adopted as the internet's collective crush
whose posting or public behavior is a reputational liability
unconventional crush pitched as a test of persuasion
angular, wiry, sharp-featured; unconventionally attractive "like a rat" (complimentary)
chaotic, goofy, dim-but-lovable himbo energy
disciplined, protective, possibly employed by the state
intimidating in public, fiercely soft with his person
lean, polished, vigilant, expensively severe
adventurous and outdoorsy but high-maintenance and fussy
appeal from charisma plus one unusually compelling feature
yappy, clingy, dramatic small-dog energy
intense, protective lone-wolf with a possessive streak (mostly BookTok)
wide-eyed, broad-mouthed frog-coded alternative to the rat man
extremely tall, narrow, aristocratically strange-looking

sections.title: Male Hierarchy & Status Memes
sections.note: The alpha–beta hierarchy (coined by "Vox Day," spread through the manosphere, now half-ironic Gen-Alpha slang), plus aura/rizz status systems.

items.gloss: self-appointed dominant leader of an imaginary pack
compliant follower framed as subordinate

items.terms: Big dawg / Lil bro / Unc / Oldhead / Young buck
items.gloss: the status-address ladder from respected elder to patronized junior
"lone wolf" who rejects the hierarchy while obsessing over his rank in it
man understood mainly through his charm (real or alleged)

items.terms: Rizz god / Unspoken-rizz guy / Negative-rizz guy
items.gloss: near-supernatural charm; attracts by presence not words; reliably kills attraction by speaking
projects relaxed "big dick energy" confidence
defined through income, discipline, status, bargaining power
impossibly sculpted final form of Chad (from photographer Krista Sudmalis's "Sleek'N'Tears" images)
swaggering hyper-successful authority figure; heavily Andrew Tate–coded
treats isolation, overwork and emotional suppression as competitive edge; optimizes every leisure activity into revenue
performs cinematic coolness to bank "aura points"; relies on staging over accomplishment
kills his social life to chase one goal; one inconvenience from a public meltdown; conspicuously busy and "making moves"
declared unattractive or badly styled in Gen-Z/Alpha slang (descriptor)
the most extreme recognizable version of any archetype
bottom-rung outsider; hopeless loser or liberated eccentric depending on speaker
attractive-but-not-quite-Chad tiers on the PSL scale
the ordinary majority; the bitter socially-inept one; Beale's rebrand of "beta" *(the rarely-invoked deep cuts)*

sections.title: Wojaks & Terminally Online Men
sections.note: The "-oomer" Wojaks are literally designed as personality types.

items.gloss: accused of repeating programmed opinions without independent thought
nihilistic young man / the recovered hopeful version / flamboyantly apocalyptic edition

items.terms: Terminally online guy / Touch-grass candidate / Discourse tourist
items.gloss: knows every discourse cycle but can't explain it; insufficient offline contact; adopts each controversy briefly
shock-value-as-courage; the anonymity-as-persona poster; associative conspiratorial monologues
poorly-groomed entitled nerd; isolated adult imagined on parental support
withdrawn from education/employment; the severe homebound recluse (Japanese term, globalized via anime)
terminally-Reddit / terminally-4chan men

items.terms: Reddit mod / Discord mod / Reply-all warrior / Forum elder / Thread necromancer
items.gloss: petty online authority figures and the eternal-poster set
porn-depleted man (Wojak with red eyes)
identity consists of buying branded product
blank-faced everyman for alienation, humiliation, identification
glasses-and-gaping-mouth Wojak mocking over-excited "nu-male" reactions
millennial with spiritually boomer hobbies and nostalgia
broccoli-haired caricature of Gen-Z speech
stoic handsome Wojak who accepts an accusation unashamed
tiny-brained fool / large-brained (usually ironic)
the distraught face hidden behind a confident mask
self-satisfied smirk; wide-eyed "noticing a pattern" *(dogwhistle-adjacent)*
angry receding-chin Wojak for reactionaries *(image derives from a mass-shooter's photo)*
can't be sincere without deniability; recovers sincerity through irony; leaves you unsure if he means it; satire indistinguishable from the real thing
so many layers that sincerity is unrecoverable (the Jreg-fandom archetype)
performs depth without having it

items.terms: History buff / Philosophy bros / Film buffs / Math geek / Chess nerd
items.gloss: the classic hobby-intellectual set
Marcus Aurelius under sports-car photos; retained the will to power, lost the philology

items.terms: Film bro / Letterboxd bro / A24 guy / Criterion guy
items.gloss: canon-certainty over curiosity; taste via rankings; one distributor as a personality; authoritative-edition collector

items.terms: Roman-Empire guy / Map guy / Transit guy / Urbanism bro / Flag (vexillology) guy
items.gloss: thinks about Rome often; finds infrastructure more legible than people; civilization via service frequency; induced-demand at parties; ranks countries by graphic design
conversation as a queue of corrections; one question becomes the history of a railway gauge
opinions into a newsletter; worldview from three-hour interviews

items.terms: Nolan / Tarantino / Scorsese / Kubrick / Lynch guy
items.gloss: the auteur-stan lineup

items.terms: Lit bro / Infinite Jest guy / Bukowski / Murakami / Kafka / Dostoevsky guy
items.gloss: the prestige-canon reader set
the "correct object will finally organize me" trio
the right-wing "low-T liberal" pejorative; gentle plant-based guy
progressive politics worn early and visibly; feminism as performance

items.terms: Museum-date / Opera / Classical-music / Architecture / Mid-century-modern / Design guy
items.gloss: the cultural-capital-as-romance set

items.terms: Theatre nurds / Science educator / Art boi / Burner bois
items.gloss: grown theater kids; the Bill-Nye explainer; art-scene guy; Burning Man regulars
effective altruists (malaria nets to AI risk)
LessWrong rationalists; ex-rats gone mystical; and the pun bridge
footwear as archive/investment; chases scarce drops; hunts discontinued designer collections by item code
shaved sides + voluminous curly top, as generational uniform
2000s appearance-conscious straight man; performed ruggedness (beard + flannel); anti-distinctive basics; the trained-and-exposed body as the outfit
technical outdoor gear worn mainly in cities; the older version who actually checks weather specs
inherited-estate fantasy; restrained expensive unbranded fabric; wants insiders (not the public) to clock the price

items.terms: Alt boy / Emo boy / Scene kid / Goth boyfriend
items.gloss: TikTok-assembled alt; theatrical black-clad pop-punk descendant; Myspace-era maximal hair; dark-clad romantic accessory
TikTok alt-aesthetic boys: chains, painted nails, curtain hair
minimalist neat hair, neutral basics, visible skincare
tweed-and-libraries melancholy; the same fantasy with sun and cream trousers

items.terms: Workwear guy / Selvedge-denim guy / Heritage-menswear guy / Patina guy
items.gloss: chore coats to a laptop job; documents fabric fading like geology; historically-correct construction; every scratch improves the object
terrace-culture football-shirt styling; buys another country's 1998 away kit and bonds with it
late-2000s flash-photography nightlife revival; shiny synthetics and tiny eyewear

items.terms: Techwear ninja / Rick Owens guy / Opium guy
items.gloss: black straps-and-pockets urban mission that never arrives; elongated posthuman silhouette; Playboi Carti–adjacent vampiric black
deliberate stylish-retiree dressing; affluent-seaside linen nonchalance
imaginary maritime or Western labor as wardrobe
feminine-presenting young men (presentation, not orientation)

items.terms: Pearl-necklace guy / Painted-nails guy / Mustache man
items.gloss: gender-flexible menswear signifiers; self-expression or softboy semiotics; ironic/retro/fashion-literate mustache
carries indie bookstores on one shoulder; rejects AirPods as an aesthetic/authenticity stance

items.terms: Supplement stacker / Nootropics guy / Peptide guy
items.gloss: furniture-sized pill organizer; cognitive compounds; the technical recovery/anti-aging gray market

items.terms: Huberman bro / Attia guy / Don't-Die (Bryan Johnson) disciple
items.gloss: podcast episodes into instant rules; zone-2 and grip-strength thinking; treats death as an engineering problem on a branded protocol
reports what his ring thinks happened overnight; turns life into longitudinal research

items.terms: Science bro / Biohacker / Longevity bro / Protocol guy
items.gloss: packages research + physique; self-experiments with biomarkers; maximizes lifespan/healthspan; follows an exact daily sequence

items.terms: Sauna bro / Red-light guy / Mouth-tape guy / Nasal-breathing guy
items.gloss: the recovery-gadget and airway-optimization set
removes stimulation to restore motivation; the rigid 75-day challenge

items.terms: Carnivore bro / Meatfluencer / Raw-milk guy / Seed-oil disrespector / Ancestral-living guy
items.gloss: meat-only ideological content; unpasteurized-dairy rebellion; blames seed oils for modern illness; reconstructs a selective premodern life

items.terms: Testosterone optimizer / TRT evangelist / Sun-your-balls guy
items.gloss: adjusts everything around one hormone; TRT as the missing explanation; the literal memeable endpoint of the discourse
drinks raw eggs "for testosterone"
health from earth contact; meat-sprint-sun-minimal-shoes evolutionary fantasy
explains behavior via regulation and vagal tone; may be genuinely careful or may insert it into everything
improves every measurable part of life except his enjoyment of it
eclectic worldview from comedians, fighters and three-hour interviews; politics from sports and male grievance

items.terms: Enlightened / Radical / Contrarian centrist / Heterodox guy
items.gloss: "both sides equally irrational"; individually extreme but party-less; truth by disagreeing with his in-group; a scene defined by questioning consensus (often in one direction)
every dispute a civilizational speech test; persona built on being "forbidden" from saying widely-circulated things

items.terms: Environmentalists / Performative hippie / Eco anarchist / Solarpunk guy / Degrowth guy
items.gloss: the green spectrum from lifestyle to sabotage to eco-utopian design to deliberate de-growth

items.terms: Libertarian bro / Constitution guy / Ancap / Sovereign-citizen guy
items.gloss: markets + tech + regulation opinions; pocket-constitutionalism; max-market anarcho-capitalist; believes special language exempts him from law
materially prepares for disruption; the total-worldview bunker version; plans ordinary life around expected decline
comfortable progressive treating politics as lifestyle; anti-Trump institutional symbolism

items.terms: Bernie bro / Podcast leftist / Dirtbag leftist / Brocialist
items.gloss: the ardent Sanders supporter; formed by comedy over organizations; vulgar anti-respectability left; the socialist whose egalitarianism weakens around gender
speed-and-rhetoric public arguer; ideological conflict as live entertainment
leftist slang for a reactionary loser (from the film *C.H.U.D.*)

items.terms: YIMBY bro / Urbanist left guy / Nuclear bro / Climate-tech bro
items.gloss: abundant-housing charts; transit+housing+labor; nuclear as the obvious answer; decarbonization as a venture opportunity

items.terms: Tradcath guy / Orthobro / Trad futurist / Homesteader conservative
items.gloss: traditionalist-Catholic identity; rigorous young Orthodox convert; wants space travel + patriarchy + Roman statues; politics via land and family production
authoritarian leftist reflexively defending anti-Western states; picks positions by reversing the State Department
began on the left, now defined by hostility to it; departure-as-career-genre
distrusts distant institutions, idealizes small-scale control
alt-right politics with chad presentation; confrontational nationalist activist; rejects mainstream conservatism as weak *(extremist-associated)*

items.terms: NRx / Neoreactionary / Dark-Enlightenment / Techno-monarchist / Network-state guy
items.gloss: anti-democratic theorists wanting hierarchy, a founder-king, or sovereign online communities
fuses environmental concern with authoritarian ethnonationalism *(extremist)*
wants existing contradictions intensified until the system breaks

items.terms: Vibe coder / Prompt bro / Agent bro / Wrapper founder
items.gloss: builds software via natural language without reading the output; verbal instructions as elite craft; thinks agents will do every workflow; puts a UI and billing layer on someone else's model
mass-produces low-effort generated media for algorithmic volume

items.terms: Doomers / Decel / AI safetyist / Alignment bro
items.gloss: expects AI to end badly; accused of wanting to slow progress; prioritizes catastrophic-risk reduction; discusses making AI pursue intended goals
build AGI faster

items.terms: Open source evangelist / Open-weights absolutist / Closed-model loyalist
items.gloss: self-explanatory; treats downloadable weights as a political principle; prefers capability and integration over openness

items.terms: Benchmark bro / Eval guy / Scaling-law guy / AGI truther

sections.title: Productive Archetype Generators
sections.note: Why no glossary can ever list "every" male archetype: the English web mints a new one by attaching almost any interest, defect, ideology, or preference to a recognized suffix or template.

confident man over-identified with X (finance bro, padel bro, nuclear bro)
mythic/totalizing; younger/softer/ironic; British-jovial (finance man; sad boy; Lego lad)
older/overprepared; older/authoritative/erotic (rave dad; sugar daddy)

maps temperament or face onto a species/breed
